title: 生物戰利品表擴充│Loot Table Expansion for Mobs
description:
凋零骷髏會掉落鑽石，伏守者會掉落強化深板岩。
│Wither Skeleton will drop Diamond, and Warden will drop Reinforced Deepslate.
body:
# 此資料包已停更│This Data Pack has stopped updating
此資料包已經停止更新，同時拆分成了多個資料包，[點我](https://modrinth.com/collection/a9a43bsL)下載拆分後的資料包。│This data pack has stopped updating and has been split into multiple data packs. [Click Here](https://modrinth.com/collection/a9a43bsL) to download the split data packs.
# 功能│Function 
1. 具有抗火效果的凋零骷髏被玩家擊殺後有 10% 的幾率掉落鑽石。│Wither Skeletons have a 10% chance of dropping a Diamond when killed by a Player when it has a Fire Resistance effect.
2. 伏守者死亡後有 20% 的幾率掉落強化深板岩。│There is a 20% chance that the Warden will drop Reinforced Deepslate when it dies.
3. 蝙蝠被伏守者擊殺後有 50% 的幾率掉落回聲碎片。│There is a 50% chance that the Bat will drop Echo Shard when killed by a Warden.
# 使用示例影片│Usage example video

# 更多│More
[點我](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT)查看更多我的作品。│[Click me](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT) to see more of my works.
